_doc: R76 Layer G — dia 2022/23 outlier exclusion DRY-RUN. NO WRITE APPLIED. Deal-by-deal by reason (Scott's gate: never a price threshold). Project: Dialysis_DB (zqzrriwuavgrquhisnoa). Effect = set sales_transactions.exclude_from_market_metrics=true with the reason in cap_rate_notes. Median dia deal $3.0M / p95 $10.26M for scale; a single dialysis clinic is ~7-15k sf at ~$300-700/sf.

exclude.evidence: Retail-center property type, address RANGE (multi-building), $4,285/sf is impossible for a single 13k-sf clinic — a whole multi-tenant center price mis-attached to one parcel; not a single-clinic NNN dialysis comp.
$50M Healthcare with NO dialysis tenant, no operator, no building size — no evidence this is a single dialysis clinic; portfolio/campus-scale unconfirmed.
Real DaVita tenant BUT $3,466/sf on a 10.5k-sf clinic is physically impossible (~5-10x a normal clinic $/sf) — the $36.5M is a portfolio/multi-asset price mis-attached to a single clinic parcel.

exclude.addr: 1052-1090 Old Des Peres Rd, Des Peres MO
exclude.evidence: Tenant 'Mens Medical Institute' is NOT dialysis; address RANGE (multi-building); $5,160/sf impossible — non-dialysis and/or whole-center.
98,136-sf RETAIL property at $368/sf = a whole retail center, not a single dialysis clinic; no dialysis tenant.

exclude.addr: 501 N State Rd 7, Royal Palm Beach FL
exclude.evidence: Real DaVita tenant BUT $4,734/sf on a 7.2k-sf clinic is impossible — $34M is a portfolio/multi-asset price mis-attached to a single clinic parcel.

hold_for_scott_verdict.evidence: GENUINE dialysis (Northwest Kidney Centers' Broadway flagship), but 'Office' type and $42.5M with no per-clinic sf reads as a whole office building / NKC HQ campus — a non-representative whole-building deal, not a single-clinic NNN comp. Single facility = keep+note; whole building/HQ = exclude. Scott's call.

before_after_note: After excluding the 6 (and, pending verdict, Seattle), the dia avg-deal-size and TTM-volume series lose the 2022/23 spike (median market $3.0M). Exact before/after per affected quarter will be captured at commit time once the verdict set is fixed.
next: Scott independent check of each reason tag + the Seattle verdict -> then the flag write (effect-first, reason in cap_rate_notes) -> recapture before/after.
